title: Devil SMP
description: This plugin adds 6 different sigils that will imitate the abilities of the unseen underworld
body:
The DevilSMP plugin introduces a dark, thrilling experience to your Minecraft server with 6 powerful sigils, each mimicking abilities that draw from the depths of the underworld. These sigils grant players dark, unique powers that can be activated with a simple shift + right-click, offering an exciting new layer of strategy and chaos to the gameplay. Players gain theses sigils by crafting rerollers or gaining one on their first time joining.

Sigils and Their Abilities:

Malzereth – The Infernal Flame:

Effect: This sigil summons a massive burst of fire around the player, setting nearby enemies ablaze. The fiery effect also damages mobs within proximity, causing chaos in combat. The flame lingers for a few moments, dealing additional burn damage.

Special: While active, the player becomes immune to fire damage for a short period, further enhancing their underworld connection.

Nyxarion – Shadow's Embrace:

Effect: When activated, the player is surrounded by a shroud of dark mist, making them completely invisible to enemies for a short time. Additionally, their movements are faster in shadow form.

Special: The player gains temporary Night Vision, making it perfect for sneaking and setting traps during nighttime raids.

Serkavos – The Bonebreaker:

Effect: This sigil causes the player's attacks to deal increased damage based on their current health, with an additional bonus of weakening enemies hit for a few seconds. Players also gain a temporary shield that absorbs damage before it depletes.

Special: Hitting an enemy while falling from a height (5+ blocks) triggers a launchback effect, forcing the enemy to stagger backward.

Azgrel – The Demon's Wrath:

Effect: Upon activation, the player jumps into the air with immense force, creating a fiery explosion on landing that damages and knocks back all nearby entities. This sigil's explosion ignores armor, dealing true damage.

Special: The sigil can be recharged by performing combat moves, such as killing mobs or dealing damage to players.

Drexithar – The Soulbinder:

Effect: This sigil allows players to summon a temporary vortex that pulls in nearby enemies within an 8-block radius. A dark, swirling aura damages enemies and applies Slowness and Weakness. The effect lasts for 10 seconds, making it a strategic ability for crowd control.

Special: Enemies caught in the vortex also suffer from the Wither effect for the duration of the skill.

Gorvul – The Raging Tyrant:

Effect: When Gorvul is activated, the player’s strength is amplified, allowing them to deal massive damage and destroy blocks in their path. A shockwave effect is triggered, knocking back any player or mob in the vicinity, and dealing true damage in the process.

Special: The sigil suppresses enemy consumable usage, disabling potions and food for a short time, making it a game-changing tool in combat.
